attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_CLL_F189_INVOICE_LINES)

FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CLL_F189_INVOICE_LINES STG_CG1_CLL_F189_INVOICE_LINES,
 (
 select INVOICE_LINE_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CLL_F189_INVOICE_LINES
 minus
 select INVOICE_LINE_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_CLL_F189_INVOICE_LINES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.INVOICE_LINE_ID = STG_CG1_CLL_F189_INVOICE_LINES.INVOICE_LINE_ID and ACM.ORGANIZATION_ID = STG_CG1_CLL_F189_INVOICE_LINES.ORGANIZATION_ID and  ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_CLL_F189_INVOICE_LINES.REFRESH_DATETIME
